title: Gilded Stone Totem Of Undying
description: This resource pack turns your totem of undying into Gilded Blackstone
body:
# Gilded Blackstone Totem of Undying

**Embrace the power of the Nether with a bold new look!** This resource pack transforms the classic Totem of Undying into a Gilded Blackstone Totem of Undying, combining dark blackstone textures with rich golden details for a fierce, treasure-forged aesthetic.

## Why download it?

- Epic Design: A dark, Nether-inspired style infused with gold accents, inspired by the powerful look of gilded blackstone.
- Perfect for Hardcore Players: Adds an intimidating, battle-hardened presence to the item that saves your life when everything is on the line.
- Lightweight & Compatible: Optimized to work smoothly with other resource packs and shaders. Stand out with a totem that looks forged in the depths of the Nether.
  
# Terms of Use

You are free to use this resource pack in Minecraft, your videos, and your modpacks.

If you include it in a modpack or showcase it in a video, I would appreciate it if you add a link to this page in the description.

**_Do not redistribute or claim the pack as your own._**
